summary: Dashboard Profile drawer now distinguishes no-current-goal from satisfied compliance: when there is no current Nori Contract, the Profile icon opens a readonly drawer that shows NOT EVALUATED, explains Profile is current-contract-scoped, and says no current goal profile is active instead of reporting empty Profile as COMPLETE.

sources.label: Playwright observation: clicked Inspect Nori Profile on the no-current Agent Workbench dashboard; drawer showed PROFILE: Profile, compliance NOT EVALUATED, No Current Goal Profile, and No current goal profile is active.

reviewability: Run the listed commands, start dashboard against a no-current-goal project, click the header Profile icon, and verify the drawer says NOT EVALUATED with no-current explanatory copy rather than COMPLETE.
limitations: This verifies current dashboard Profile semantics and selection state. It does not restore historical Profile items into a new active contract; completed goal details remain report/history state.
